NOTE the csadmin KV pg-admin-password failed auth (stale - rotation footgun) so DDL used the Entra azure_pg_admin path. Active intake set now EXACTLY info@ + engineers@ + desk@; durable monitor subscription-monitor-singleton confirmed Running. notes: READ-ONLY ground-truth snapshot. No secrets/tokens stored. 2026-06-29T15:39Z UPDATE — Graph intake mailbox cutover finished: graphSubscriptions, mailboxRbac and gates.GRAPH_INTAKE_MAILBOXES now reflect the production set info@ + engineers@ + desk@ (test mailbox digital@ removed). Other fields (functionCounts, BOX/ENRICHMENT gates, httpsOnly) unchanged from the 2026-06-29 doc-hygiene pass. postgresCounts remain unverified (PG firewall + no local psql). KNOWN DURABILITY GAP: runSubscriptionMaintenance auto-creates missing intake mailboxes but does NOT delete subscriptions for mailboxes removed from GRAPH_INTAKE_MAILBOXES (it renews ALL existing subs), so a mailbox REMOVAL needs manual deletion until a prune step is added (see subscriptionRenewalRisk.note).

Production mailbox set info@ + engineers@ + desk@ is now fully scoped + subscribed.

value.rootCause: Flex Consumption does not wake a scaled-to-zero app for a plain timer trigger, so graph-renew (NCRONTAB) logged 0 executions in 7d and subscriptions were heading for a silent lapse (azure-diagnostician root-caused, App Insights component cespk-orch-dev).
value.fix: Durable eternal-orchestration subscriptionMonitorOrchestrator (instanceId subscription-monitor-singleton, runtimeStatus Running): renew activity -> durable timer (SUBSCRIPTION_MONITOR_INTERVAL_HOURS, default 6h) -> continueAsNew. A durable timer message WAKES a scaled-to-zero Flex app (Microsoft Learn), so renewal fires unattended with NO always-ready instance and NO external scheduler. Bootstrapped by intake-starter (any intake traffic) and by the graph-renew HTTP route; the original graph-renew timer is retained as a backstop.

subscriptionRenewalRisk.sourceCommand: durable mgmt GET /runtime/webhooks/durabletask/instances/subscription-monitor-singleton (runtimeStatus Running, name subscriptionMonitorOrchestrator); also confirmed via POST /api/graph-renew JSON monitor.status=Running
subscriptionRenewalRisk.note: OPERATOR WATCH (next cycle): confirm an UNATTENDED renew fires at the durable-timer wake (~6h cadence) i.e. graph-renewal-success in App Insights with no manual trigger. 2026-06-29T15:39Z: the singleton was re-confirmed Running during the mailbox cutover (graph-renew HTTP returned monitor.status=Running) and it now covers all 3 production subs (it renews EVERY existing sub). DURABILITY GAP (recommended small code fix): runSubscriptionMaintenance create-misses + renews but never PRUNES — a mailbox REMOVED from GRAPH_INTAKE_MAILBOXES keeps its subscription (renewed forever), which is exactly why the de-scoped digital@ sub had to be deleted by hand here. Recommend adding a prune step to runSubscriptionMaintenance (subscriptions.ts): after create+renew, delete any of OUR subs whose mailboxOfResource(resource) is not in intakeMailboxes(), so a GRAPH_INTAKE_MAILBOXES change fully self-reconciles (add+remove) on the next maintenance tick. Belt-and-braces renewal fallback if the durable timer ever fails: az functionapp scale config always-ready set -g rg-collisionspike-dev -n cespk-orch-dev --settings function:graph-renew=1 (always-ready cost — flagged, NOT enabled).

postgresCounts.sourceCommand: psql (Entra oss-rdbms token, user digital@collisionengineers.co.uk) SELECT count(*) -- owner read bypasses RLS so case_=0 is the true count
postgresCounts.reason: 2026-06-30 (work-todo-spike LIVE migration): applied the idempotent additive DDL delta to db collisionspike as Entra digital@ (azure_pg_admin) -> SET ROLE csadmin (table owner). Added: ai_suggestion table (csadmin-owned, RLS ENABLE+FORCE, policies p_ai_suggestion_rw + p_ai_suggestion_no_delete, GRANT SELECT/INSERT/UPDATE to cespk_app, 3 FKs case/evidence CASCADE + inbound_email SET NULL, 4 indexes); inbound_email.suggested_category_code + suggested_subtype_code (+ canonical FKs); choice_audit_action 100000027-100000034 (8 rows); choice_case_status 100000011 'removed'; uq_case_case_po UNIQUE on upper(case_po) WHERE case_po IS NOT NULL (was ABSENT live, created fresh). public BASE tables 37->38; case_ confirmed 0 rows (owner read). The seed/910 provider_automation_mode_code flip was NOT applied (out of scope -- touches the 390-row corpus). A transient workstation firewall rule was added then REMOVED (only AllowAzureServices remains). NOTE: the csadmin KV secret pg-admin-password FAILED auth (2 versions, stale rotation footgun) -> DDL went via the Entra azure_pg_admin path instead. work_provider=390 last confirmed 2026-06-29 (not re-verified this pass; work_provider FORCE RLS reads 0 without app.role).
